headline: Texas Is Data Center Country. NextEra and More Utilities That Could Benefit.
summary: Texas has abundant natural gas and is adding renewable energy faster than any other state, making it attractive to power-hungry data centers.

headline: Jefferies Maintains Buy on CenterPoint Energy, Raises Price Target to $49
